# Clojure language server (clojure-lsp) test

# Start acme-lsp server
env ACME_LSP_CONFIG=$WORK/config.toml
acme-lsp -headless -rootdir $WORK -workspaces $WORK &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp src/hello.clj after-format.txt

# Definition of "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#296'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello\.clj:.*:\(defrecord HelloGreeter \[\]'

# References to "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#164'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello\.clj:.*:\(defrecord HelloGreeter \[\]'
stdout 'hello\.clj:.*:  \(let \[g \(->HelloGreeter\)\]'

# Type definition seems to be unsupported by clojure-lsp

# Signature of the "hello" method call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#314'
L -headless sig
stdout '\(hello \[this\]\)'

# Hover over "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#296'
L -headless hov
stdout '\[\{\{clojure hello/->HelloGreeter\}\} \{\{clojure \[\]\}\} \{.*/hello.clj\}\]'

# Implementation of "Greeter" protocol
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#63'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello.clj:.*:  Greeter'

# Completion in middle of "->HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#296'
L -headless comp
stdout '->HelloGreeter'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'hello'
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'HelloGreeter'
stdout '-main'
stdout '/hello\.clj:'

# Query workspace symbols
L -headless wss HelloGreeter
stdout 'hello.clj:.*:\(defrecord HelloGreeter \[\]'

# Rename HelloGreeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/src/hello.clj:'#164'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp src/hello.clj after-rename.txt


-- src/hello.clj --
(ns hello)

;; Greeter is a greeting protocol.
(defprotocol Greeter
;; hello prints a greeting
(hello [this]))

;; HelloGreeter greets with hello
(defrecord HelloGreeter []
Greeter
;; hello prints a hello greeting
(hello [this]
(println "Hello, 世界")))

(defn -main []
(let [g (->HelloGreeter)]
(hello g)))
-- after-format.txt --
(ns hello)

;; Greeter is a greeting protocol.
(defprotocol Greeter
;; hello prints a greeting
  (hello [this]))

;; HelloGreeter greets with hello
(defrecord HelloGreeter []
  Greeter
;; hello prints a hello greeting
  (hello [this]
    (println "Hello, 世界")))

(defn -main []
  (let [g (->HelloGreeter)]
    (hello g)))
-- after-rename.txt --
(ns hello)

;; Greeter is a greeting protocol.
(defprotocol Greeter
;; hello prints a greeting
  (hello [this]))

;; HelloGreeter greets with hello
(defrecord WorldGreeter []
  Greeter
;; hello prints a hello greeting
  (hello [this]
    (println "Hello, 世界")))

(defn -main []
  (let [g (->WorldGreeter)]
    (hello g)))
-- deps.edn --
{}
-- config.toml --
[Servers]
  [Servers.clojureLsp]
  Command = ["clojure-lsp"]

[[FilenameHandlers]]
  Pattern = "\\.clj$"
  LanguageID = "clojure"
  ServerKey = "clojureLsp"
